I believe not those neurons pay attention to the rate of blood flow through the heart and send a signal up to the brain that blood is moving more slowly through the heart.
The brain then sends a signal back to the heart to speed the heart up.
So, what this means is if you want your heart to beat faster, inhale longer, inhale more vigorously than your exhales.
